Every time I see posts  expressed through images, I feel a quiet kind of appreciation.

Because I know that he, perhaps more than anyone in this vast universe, finds a rare and genuine joy in the sight of rain — when thunder rolls, lightning cuts across the sky, and his heart is filled with wonder each time.

And somehow, that wonder travels… it reaches me too.

It reminds me that rain is not just weather. It is a breathtaking phenomenon we may have overlooked too many times. In those moments, beneath the falling sky, we — as humans — feel small, almost insignificant… yet deeply alive.
